---
name: Mod Adaptation Request
about: Write the mod you want to adapt to
title: "[Feature]Title"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Mod Information

- **Mod Name**: [The full name of the mod, e.g. Sophisticated Storage]

- **Mod Official Link**: [CurseForge/Modrinth/GitHub link of the mod, e.g. [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sophisticated-storage](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sophisticated-storage)]

- **Mod ID**: [The internal ID of the mod, e.g. sophisticatedstorage, you can find it in the mod's files or mod list]

- **Mod Version**: [The version of the mod you are using, e.g. 0.19.15]

## Adaptation Requirements

- **Interfaces to Adapt**: [List the interfaces that need AE-style adaptation, e.g. inventory interface, crafting terminal, machine GUI]

- **Theme Preference**: [Specify if you need light theme, dark theme or both adaptations, e.g. both light and dark themes]

- **Special Requirements**: [Any special requirements for the UI, e.g. keep certain original design elements, adjust the layout for better experience]

## Additional Information

- **Modpack Context**: [If this mod is used in a specific modpack, e.g. GregTech-Odyssey, please mention it]

- **Screenshots**: [Attach screenshots of the mod's original UI here, which can help us understand the design style better]

- **Other Notes**: [Any other information that may help with the adaptation, e.g. common usage scenarios of this mod]
